result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  add                      Add attribute.
  cli-schema               Print CLI schema in JSON format.
  generate ioc-defaults    Collect class and generate [IocRegisterDefaults] annotations.
  generate ioc-for         Collect class and generate [IocRegisterFor] annotations.

commands.payload:
Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  add                      Add attribute.
  cli-schema               Print CLI schema in JSON format.
  generate ioc-defaults    Collect class and generate [IocRegisterDefaults] annotations.
  generate ioc-for         Collect class and generate [IocRegisterFor] annotations.

result.stdout:
Usage: add [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Add attribute.

Options:
  -t, --target <string?>               Target directory or file, default is current directory. [Default: null]
  -f, --file-pattern <string>          File pattern to filter files. [Default: @"*.cs"]
  -s, --search-sub-directories         Whether to search sub directories.
  -cn, --class-name-regex <string?>    Regex pattern to match class names.
                                       Full regex will be: "(public|internal)\s+(?!static\s+)[\w\s]*class\s+(classNameRegex)(?=\s|:|$)" [Default: null]
  --full-regex <string?>               Full regex pattern to match file content. [Default: null]
  --attribute-name <string>            Name of the attribute to add, default is IocRegister [Default: @"IocRegister"]
  -m, --max-apply <int>                How many matches should apply, 0 means unlimited. [Default: 0]
  -n, --dry-run                        Dry run.
  -v, --verbose                        Detailed logging message.
  --log <string>                       Logging file path. [Default: @""]

commands.payload:
Usage: add [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Add attribute.

Options:

  -s, --search-sub-directories         Whether to search sub directories.
  -cn, --class-name-regex <string?>    Regex pattern to match class names.
                                       Full regex will be: "(public|internal)\s+(?!static\s+)[\w\s]*class\s+(classNameRegex)(?=\s|:|$)" [Default: null]
  --full-regex <string?>               Full regex pattern to match file content. [Default: null]
  --attribute-name <string>            Name of the attribute to add, default is IocRegister [Default: @"IocRegister"]
  -m, --max-apply <int>                How many matches should apply, 0 means unlimited. [Default: 0]
  -n, --dry-run                        Dry run.
  -v, --verbose                        Detailed logging message.
  --log <string>                       Logging file path. [Default: @""]

result.stdout:
Usage: cli-schema [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Print CLI schema in JSON format.

Options:
  -c, --command <string?>    Command name. [Default: null]
  -t, --target <string?>     Target file/folder to write cli schema. [Default: null]
  -n, --dry-run              Dry run.
  -v, --verbose              Detailed logging message.
  --log <string>             Logging file path. [Default: @""]

commands.payload:
Usage: cli-schema [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Print CLI schema in JSON format.

Options:
  -c, --command <string?>    Command name. [Default: null]
  -t, --target <string?>     Target file/folder to write cli schema. [Default: null]
  -n, --dry-run              Dry run.
  -v, --verbose              Detailed logging message.
  --log <string>             Logging file path. [Default: @""]

result.stdout:
Usage: generate ioc-defaults [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Collect class and generate [IocRegisterDefaults] annotations.

Options:
  -o, --output-path <string>           Output file path. [Required]
  -t, --target <string?>               Target directory or file, default is current directory. [Default: null]
  -f, --file-pattern <string>          File pattern to filter files. [Default: @"*.cs"]
  -s, --search-sub-directories         Whether to search sub directories.
  -cn, --class-name-regex <string?>    Regex pattern to match class names. [Default: null]
  -b, --base-type-regex <string?>      Regex pattern to match interface/base class. [Default: null]
  -m, --max-apply <int>                How many matches should apply, 0 means unlimited. [Default: 0]
  -ig, --is-generic-attribute          Whether to generate generic attribute syntax.
  -l, --lifetime <string>              Lifetime for the service registration. Valid values: Singleton, Scoped, Transient. [Default: @"Transient"]
  -n, --dry-run                        Dry run.
  -v, --verbose                        Detailed logging message.
  --log <string>                       Logging file path. [Default: @""]
